title: onobrychis quadrijuga
intro: Onobrychis quadrijuga, also known as the four-jugate bird's foot trefoil, is a plant species within the legume family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, as well as treat various infections. The health benefits of Onobrychis quadrijuga include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage. Onobrychis quadrijuga can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
